svg.title: Western Rite Ordo — proposed system architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: Editor workflow (Google Sheets/Apps Script), Data layer (GitHub + optional BigQuery), and Consumer layer (web, PDF, API).

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Google Sheets editor workflow for the Ordo')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about using Apps Script to drive the Ordo editor workflow')
sendPrompt('What does the editor review and approve step look like for the Ordo?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about hosting the Ordo rubric engine on GitHub Pages or Cloudflare Pages')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the published JSON override file for the Ordo')
sendPrompt('When would it make sense to add BigQuery to the Ordo architecture?')
sendPrompt('How should the Ordo web calendar work for public visitors?')
sendPrompt('How should PDF generation and download work for the Ordo?')
sendPrompt('How should the parish patronal feast overlay work for the Ordo?')
sendPrompt('How would third-party API access to the Ordo data work?')
sendPrompt('What future extensions could the Ordo system support?')

svg.text: Click any box to explore that piece of the system.
